name: pta2
description: GIT on the server: 1. update and upgrade the system 2. install nodejs 3. install gogs and run on https://localhost:3000 4. create a local repo and connect to a remote repo 5. show; 	commit history, 	suitable readme file 	evidence of a pull request and merge 	evidence that some issues have been created, resolved and closed via a commit 	a repository has a simple TestCafe functional test included 	a .gitignore file (that prevents tracking the node_modules folder) 	a package.json file with TestCafe added as a development dependency 	demonstrate the TestCafe functional test in operation (i.e. run it and show a passing test)
author: Nishant Khamcha Magar
